name: Lance sterling
description:
Valentine’s Day

____________________________________

Multiple scenarios!

____________________________________

Even when I dream, you are next to me. I can’t fall asleep, if Only..

I’ll be not only doing MULTIPLE scenarios for this bot, but a MLM option on it, AND I’ll be redoing some of my old bots. They will still have their old scenarios, but I’ll make another option for a more detailed scenario! Most people are here because of my SM, MW and Simon bots, but I’d like to thank you all for supporting me!

getting out of that closet! (MLM!!)

If character starts having potential errors that repeat, tell me so I can fix it. I have no control over what the bot says, if any errors try to refresh/restart chat.
